name: @orqastudio/plugin-githooks
description: Pre-commit enforcement via git hooks — schema validation, filename-to-ID match, relationship integrity. Schema-driven: reads validation rules from installed plugin manifests.

enforcement_mechanisms.description: Git pre-commit hook — final gate before commit

hooks.description: Validates governance artifacts against plugin schemas before every commit
Auto-pushes to remote after every commit (RULE-633e636d enforcement)
Validates relationship types when writing .orqa/ artifact files

cliTools.description: Install git hooks into the project

behavioral_rules: Relationship type fields in artifact frontmatter MUST use types defined in plugin manifests (provides.relationships[].key or .inverse). Invalid types are rejected by pre-commit hook and PreAction hook.
session_reminders: Relationship types are schema-driven — valid types come from plugin manifests (provides.relationships[]). Run `node .githooks/validate-relationships.mjs --all` to check all artifacts.
